title: The Right-Hand Girlfriend
overview: High school student Seiji Sawamura loves to fight. Because of this, girls never go near him. But one day, his right hand suddenly became a girl!

title: The Love Between Us
overview: Seiji is trying to cope with Midori being his right hand. However, thugs from another school arrive to fight.

title: The Day of Discoveries
overview: Seiji's sister comes to visit. His sister's street gang arrive also and decide to go to a bathhouse.

title: Discovery of the Secret!?
overview: Midori dirtied her clothes with ice cream. Seiji decides to get her new clothes at a doll shop and ends up running into a classmate there.

title: The Power of Love
overview: Seiji was absent from P.E. due to an injury. He managed to get home, but accidentally drank alcohol and is now passed out.

title: Shiori's Love-Love Battle!
overview: On a Sunday morning, Seiji decides to take care of his neighbor, Shiori Tsukishima.

title: First Date
overview: Ayase convinces Seiji to the movies, but he is unaware that it is a date. Midori appears not to mind…

title: Right-hand Seiji
overview: Midori and Seiji have switched! Seiji is now on the right hand of Midori!

title: Takky Days
overview: Shuichi Takamizawa, Seiji's classmate, has been taking pictures of Midori and uploading it onto a website.

title: Distance of the Hearts
overview: Osamu Miyahara sets up a meeting with Seiji. Midori doesn't like the situation. Moreover, Ayase arrives not knowing Seiji was there.

title: Fated Reunion
overview: Seiji and Midori play a game where the loser has to listen to whatever the winner wishes.

title: Sudden Parting
overview: Kouta learns of Seiji and Midori's secret. If he tells Midori's family, she can become regular size again. However, Seiji is refusing…

title: Our Days
overview: Seiji's right hand returns to normal. Midori is no longer there. Ayase confesses her feelings, but it is unrequited…
